creator: freebsdports@chillibear.com
text:
Rejected.  Patch appears to be incomplete - missing an update to distinfo

See ports/153184 for an update to 1.5.4


> From: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>
> Reply-To: <bug-followup@FreeBSD.org>
> Date: Thu, 9 Dec 2010 01:31:10 UT
> To: <freebsdports@chillibear.com>
> Cc: <bug-followup@FreeBSD.org>
> Subject: Re: ports/152952: [PATCH] sysutils/rubygem-sys-admin: update to 1.5.3
> 
> Maintainer of sysutils/rubygem-sys-admin,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/152952 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/152952
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
